channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mahomes throws 3 TDs as Chiefs clinch AFC's top seed by breezing past the skidding Steelers 29-10
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Andy Reid donned a Santa Claus suit in a giddy Kansas City Chiefs locker room on Christmas Day, then handed his team a present it increasingly looks like it deserves: home-field advantage throughout the AFC playoffs.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Steelers' George Pickens raises eyebrows over postgame handshakes with Chiefs stars
item.description: Pittsburgh Steelers wide receiver George Pickens raised eyebrows with his interactions with Kansas City Chiefs stars after the Steelers' loss Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Warriors' Steph Curry gets candid about eventual NBA retirement
item.description: During a recent sit-down with ESPN, 36-year-old Golden State Warriors superstar and four-time NBA champion Steph Curry got candid about his life after basketball.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bridges scores season-high 41, Knicks withstand Wembanyama's monster Christmas debut to edge Spurs
item.description: Mikal Bridges scored a season-high 41 points, and the New York Knicks overcame 42 from Victor Wembanyama in a monster Christmas debut to edge the San Antonio Spurs 117-114 on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mahoney, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: BYU arrives in San Antonio ahead of Alamo Bowl
item.description: SAN ANTONIO, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - The Cougars have arrived in San Antonio for what they hope will be an Alamo Bowl to remember. "Super excited to be down here," said defensive end Tyler Batty.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Athletes on college football playoff teams are earning large amounts of NIL money
item.description: The 12 college football playoff teams were worth more than most other teams across the country. One company estimates the 12 rosters combined made up around $150 million.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How name, image and likeness laws have changed college sports
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled in 2021 the NCAA could not prevent student athletes from profiting from their game. Since the decision, legal fights have continued between the NCAA and US states.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz winning streak ends at Cleveland, 124-113
item.description: CLEVELAND (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz first winning streak of the season did not last very long. Darius Garland scored 23 points and the NBA-best Cleveland Cavaliers beat the Utah Jazz 124-113 on Monday night for their 17th victory in 18 home games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Houston Astros welcome 1B Christian Walker to team; say negotiations with Bregman stalled
item.description: The Astros welcomed first baseman Christian Walker to the team Monday, in one of two moves that almost certainly marks the end of Alex Bregman’s time in Houston.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies bounce back with 75-68 win over St. Mary's
item.description: MORAGA, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off its first loss of the season, the Utah State men’s basketball (11-1, 1-0 MW) got back in the win column Sunday night, closing out non-conference play with a 75-68 win over Saint Mary’s at the UCU Pavilion in Moraga.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Texans WR Tank Dell hospitalized after severe knee injury on TD catch vs. Chiefs
item.description: Texans wide receiver Tank Dell was taken to the University of Kansas Medical Center and the team said he would remain overnight after sustaining a severe left knee injury while making a 30-yard touchdown catch in a 27-19 loss to the Chiefs on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes land talented running back Wayshawn Parker
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes football team may have picked up its biggest off-season acquisition yet. Washington State running back Wayshawn Parker, considered one of the top backs in the transfer portal, announced he will play for the Utes next season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
